prose:
Aniline HOMO–LUMO gap — DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (functional override, no tier preset), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied file /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz used as-is (single-point). Software: PySCF via chemkit (exact four-center integrals; density fitting off). SCF converged in 9 cycles; no warnings reported.

HOMO = –5.553772 eV
LUMO = –0.2489544 eV
→ gap = 5.3048177 eV

Command:
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz \
  --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --nfrontier 3 \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp6jxckumu/live.json \
  --stdout path

JSON output written to /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp6jxckumu/live.json. Live log: frontier_<timestamp>.out (tail -f available).
